seoTitle: Clear Creek vs Clear Range — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Clear Creek and Clear Range. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Clear Creek vs Clear Range: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Clear Creek and Clear Range.
heading: Clear Creek vs Clear Range — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Clear Creek, New South Wales and Clear Range, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Clear Range has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Clear Creek (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Clear Creek or Clear Range safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Clear Creek has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Clear Range scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Clear Creek scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Clear Range scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Clear Creek or Clear Range?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Clear Range has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.38% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
